name: Year-End Sparks
descriptionTemplate: Temporary Crit. Rate +15%, gain 1 Arithmetica. The first time unleashed in this battle, deal [Arg3] {Ancient Embers} to all enemies.
lore:
Year after year, the blossoms return unchanged;
Season after season, I long for our reunion.

This Spring Festival is so brief, so sweet, like a beautiful dream. My dear, when you stand beside your beloved, hand in hand,
gazing upon the countless fireworks lighting the sky... pray, do not forget the devotion of this humble heart.
